trans-unit.source: Put your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
A password reset link has been sent to your email address.
Email confirmed. You can now log in.
Wrong email address or password. Please try again.
Your email is not confirmed yet. Check your inbox.
Confirmation email sent ! Check your inbox.
Password must be at least 6 characters long.
Your password has been successfully updated.
Create an account to get started
Successfully registered ! Check your email box to confirm your email.
Not enough data for history chart.
Smart tracking for your financial freedom.
Based on your recurring incomes and expenses.
Manage your account information and security.
The password must be at least 6 characters long.
Your password has been updated successfully.
Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? (If this is a recurring transaction, it will be deleted completely)
